Disconnect Positive half wave to TP3
Connect Negative half wave to TP3
Disconnect Positive half wave to TP3
Turn Pot P3 in Middle position
4.1.8 Encoder G1 Reg 13 Read first value
4.1.8 Encoder G1 Reg 13 Read and compare 1
4.1.8 Encoder G1 Reg 13 Read and compare 2

4.1.9.3 Confirm Turn off DIS1 with Reg 26

4.1.9.6 Confirm Stop of Display routine Reg 27

4.1.10.3 Confirm Turn off LED D8 Reg 24

4.1.12.4 Check if Engine is running CW

4.1.12.6 Read Hall sensor Stop Reg 25 Initial
